_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the Send SMTP Mail Message relay / sender-not-permitted sub-case (Branch 4 of send-smtp-mail-failures); mock dispatcher only. Authentication as svc-billing@contoso-test.com succeeds, but the From address (noreply@marketing-partner.com) is not one the authenticated account may send as, so the server rejects with 550 5.7.60. docsai proxied; --level Error rule precedes the generic logs rule. Token-aware matching, first match wins.
